narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Morrow County) has 859 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.2 percentage points.
